description_long: This is a modern wristwatch featuring a round case with a metallic rose gold bezel and a dark, likely glass-covered dial. The dial displays fine, minimalist hour markers and slender hands, with additional subdials and pushers on the right side, suggesting chronograph functionality. The strap is a segmented metal bracelet in a silver tone, with visible links and a robust, angular design. The case is relatively slim, and the crown and pushers are prominent, adding to the watch's technical appearance. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, suitable for both casual and formal urban settings. No visible brand logo is present on the dial or strap.
description: A sleek, modern wristwatch with a rose gold bezel, dark dial, and silver metal link bracelet. Features chronograph pushers and a minimalist, technical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile of the case, the rose gold bezel, and the segmented silver bracelet.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the round dial, rose gold bezel, and the full circular shape of the metal bracelet.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the crown and chronograph pushers visible, emphasizing the technical controls.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing all three pushers, the crown, and the detailed construction of the bracelet links.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is dark with minimalist hour markers and slender hands, featuring at least one subdial and a clean, technical layout. The style is chronograph with no numerals, focusing on indices and subtle decorative elements.
attribute_strap_type: Segmented metal link bracelet, likely stainless steel, with a robust and angular design.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with central hour, minute, and second hands, plus subdials for chronograph functions. No digital elements or date window visible.
